programme.title: Garv - Pride And Honour
programme.desc: An honest cop falls prey to a corrupt system and is dismissed from the police force. He is arrested later for his colleague's murder. Release Year: 2004 Director: Puneet ISSar

programme.title: Dashing Jigarwala 3
programme.desc: Michael Idikkula, a professor in a college, tries to develop a healthy relationship between the students and teachers and raise money for building hostels by making a short film in honour of Vishwan.

programme.title: Dil Dosti Etc
programme.desc: Two college boys arrogance leads them to challenge each other to prove their efficiencies. It stars Shreyas Talpade, Imaad Shah, Nikita Anand, Smriti Mishra and Ishita Sharma. Release Year: 2007

programme.title: Pyaar Tune Kya Kiya
programme.desc: Ria falls in love with Jai, a photographer, who is already married to Geeta. But Ria is determined to force Jai to accept her - by hook or by crook. Release Year: 2001

programme.title: Tera Jadoo Chal Gaya
programme.desc: To save her job, Pooja's friend tells their boss that Pooja is engaged to Kabir, a known artist. But she actually loves his son, Raj Release Year: 2000 Director: A. Muthu

programme.title: Shaadi No.1
programme.desc: Kothari has three daughters who shun the idea of arranged marriages. To make them realize, he wants three men to woo the ladies, and then ditch them.

programme.title: I Love NY
programme.desc: A beautiful musician Kangana Ranaut and a serious Wall Street banker Sunny Deol. They cross paths on New Year's Eve and share their unique experiences. Release Year: 2015 Director: Radhika Rao

programme.title: Housefull 2
programme.desc: Four men Akshay, John, Ritesh and Shreyas, who help each other to fool their prospective father-in-laws creating a cascade of confusion and mayhem. Film also stars Asin and Jacquiline. Release Year: 2012 Director: Sajid Khan Awards: Zee Cine Awards- Power Club - Box Office Award- Sajid Khan. Stardust Awards- Star of the Year - Male- Akshay Kumar, People's Choice Awards- Favorite Comedy Movie, Favorite Comedy Movie Star

programme.title: Helicopter Eela
programme.desc: An aspiring singer and single mother, Eela gives up her dream for her son. Years later, when she joins him in college to make-up for what's lost, she smothers him with attention he doesn't crave for.

programme.title: Singham
programme.desc: An honest and valiant cop Singham, fights against injustice. A corrupt politician challenges his ethics. Release Year: 2011 Director: Rohit Shetty Awards: Best Action: Jai Singh Nijjar, Best Performance in a Negative Role: Prakash Raj Awards of the International Indian Film Academy , Dream Director: Rohit Shetty Stardust Awards

programme.title: Mohenjo Daro
programme.desc: Sarman is a farmer in the Indus Valley. He travels to a city, Mohenjo Daro and saves the life of a beautiful woman, Chaani. Release Year: 2016
programme.category: Film, Actie, Avontuur, Historisch drama, Romantiek

programme.title: Raja Babu (1994)
programme.desc: Raja, an orphan, is adopted by a rich village couple. Later, he falls in love with a city girl. But she walks out on him on after learning that he is not as sophisticated as he portrays himself to be.

programme.title: Suryavanshi
programme.desc: Vicky Salman Khan unearths the ancient palace of the cruel queen Amrita Singh. Resurrected, the jilted queen seeks revenge against Vicky, a lookalike of the man who spurned her. Release Year: 1992 Director: Rakesh Kumar

programme.title: Ribbon
programme.desc: A married couple, and the challenges they face when they have to deal with unplanned parenthood. It stars Kalki Koechlin, Sumeet Vyas and Hitesh Malhan.

programme.title: Sholay
programme.desc: The film follows two crooks, Veeru Dharmendra and Jai Amitabh Bachchan, hired by a retired police officer Sanjeev Kumar to nab the ruthless dacoit Gabbar Singh Amjad Khan. Release Year: 1975 Director: Ramesh Sippy Awards: Best film in the last 50 years of Indian cinema: Ramesh Sippy Filmfare Awards; Best Editor: M.S. Shinde Filmfare Awards

programme.title: De De Pyaar De
programme.desc: A 50-year-old single father faces disapproval from his family and his ex-wife when he falls in love with a 26-year-old woman.

programme.title: Sadak 2
programme.desc: Ravi, a suicidal taxi driver, plans to shut shop when a young girl, Aarya, compels him to take her on a life-altering journey to Kailash.

programme.title: Dil Toh Baccha Hai Ji
programme.desc: 2011 Romantic comedy. Naren Ajay Devgn, Abhay Emraan and Milind Omi are room-mates. They embark on a journey to find true love and attempt to woo the women they are in love with. Release Year: 2011 Director: Madhur Bhandarkar

programme.title: Daddy Cool (2009)
programme.desc: An aspiring writer wants to arrange a decent funeral for his father by paying him a tribute. However, the funeral is in disarray when a series of mishaps and unusual situations take place.

programme.title: Maatr
programme.desc: 2017 Thriller film revolves around Vidya Raveena Tandon, who's left shattered after her daughter Tia's Alisha Khan murder, seeks vengeance by fighting the broken justice and criminal system.

programme.title: Jatt & Juliet 2
programme.desc: In order to get promoted, Fateh Singh, a constable, agrees to journey to Canada in order to find the commissioner's daughter. However, he lands up falling in love with her.

programme.title: Pyaar Karke Dekho
programme.desc: Ravi Kumar moves to Mumbai to pursue his lifelong dream of becoming a singer and dancer. He lies to his landlady that he is married but is baffled when Urvashi claims to be his wife.

programme.title: Sunshine Music Tours And Travels
programme.desc: Sunburn Sunny Kaushal and Rajma Romeo Ashrut Jain, who are chasing their dreams and take up a road journey from Kashmir to Goa with several strangers.

programme.title: Barefoot To Goa
programme.desc: 2015 drama revolves around two school kids, Diya Saara and her elder brother Prakhar Prakhar, who embark on a journey to Goa to bring back their grandmother who has been ignored by their parents. Release Year: 2015 Director: Praveen Morchhale

programme.title: Rang Panjab
programme.desc: A man who stands against the bad things he is seeing happening around him such as politics, administration problems, drugs, crime.

programme.title: Jolly LLB 2
programme.desc: A blunt, compassionate, struggling lawyer moves from Kanpur to Lucknow to pursue his dream of making it big-time. Release Year: 2017 Director: Subhash Kapoor

programme.title: Chhapaak
programme.desc: A young woman tries to rebuild her life after a man throws acid in her face on a public street in New Delhi in 2005.

programme.title: Aiyaary
programme.desc: An Indian Army officer is compelled to chase down his protege when the latter turns rogue and threatens to disrupt the country's government and army. Release Year: 2018

programme.title: Angrezi Medium
programme.desc: Though Champak initially disapproves, he eventually does everything in his power while going through a series of hilarious mishaps to fulfil his daughter's dream of going to London to study further.

programme.title: O Teri
programme.desc: While searching for a story to prove a point, two TV reporters discover a corpse in their car! Release Year: 2014 Director: Umesh Bist

programme.title: Sarkar Raj
programme.desc: Maharashtra's most powerful family faces conflict when Vishnu departs, never to return. The evil forces gang up to bring down the regime of Sarkar. Release Year: 2008 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: Door Ki Awaaz
programme.desc: Prakash weds Jyoti against his mother's wishes, only to have her disappear from their lives, leaving their son behind.

programme.title: Break Ke Baad
programme.desc: A headstrong, wannabe actress Aalia wants personal space in her relationship with Abhay who wants proximity. Release Year: 2010 Director: Danish Aslam

programme.title: 2 States
programme.desc: Coming from two very different cultural backgrounds, Krish and Ananya find it difficult to convince their parents about their love. Release Year: 2014 Director: Abhishek Varman Awards: Best Music Director: Shankar, Ehsaan: Loy , Best Debut Director: Abhishek Varman.

programme.title: Sanam Re (2016)
programme.desc: A man focused on his career finds solace when he reunites with his childhood sweetheart.

programme.title: Jatt James Bond
programme.desc: Sinda along with two of his friends plan to teach his relatives, who've ill-treated him, a lesson of a lifetime. Release Year: 2014 Director: Rohit Jugraj

programme.title: Kaabil
programme.desc: This is the story of a blind couple who lived, laughed and loved just like everyone in this world. Until one day, a terrible tragedy struck. Release Year: 2017 Director: Sanjay Gupta

programme.title: Khiladiyon Ka Khiladi
programme.desc: Akshay reaches the US and finds that his brother is missing. His search leads him to the biggest criminal in town, Maya. Release Year: 1996 Director: Umesh Mehra

programme.title: Ishq
programme.desc: Ranjit and Harbanslal want their children Ajay Devgan and Madhu Juhi to marry each other. But, Madhu falls in love with Raja Aamir while Ajay falls in love with Kajal Kajol. Release Year: 1997 Director: Indra Kumar

programme.title: Do Knot Disturb
programme.desc: Raj Govinda is married to the sophisticated Kiran Sushmita Sen. He tries to hide his affair with a model Dolly Lara Dutta. Watch the fun as Raj covers up his affair. Release Year: 2009 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Ishq
programme.desc: Ranjit and Harbanslal want their children Ajay Devgan and Madhu Juhi to marry each other. But, Madhu falls in love with Raja Aamir while Ajay falls in love with Kajal Kajol. Release Year: 1997 Director: Indra Kumar

programme.title: Ardaas Karaan
programme.desc: During times of conflict, three elderly men try to instill values in their families.

programme.title: Baadshaho
programme.desc: An Indian queen Ileana D'Cruz asks her bodyguard Ajay Devgn to steal back gold taken from her by the Indian government during The Emergency period in 1975. Release Year: 2017 Director: Milan Luthria
programme.category: Film, Actie, Thriller, Historisch drama, Avontuur

programme.title: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag
programme.desc: Milkha Singh, the 'Flying Sikh', overcame the massacre of his family during India's partition, to become India's iconic athlete. Release Year: 2013 Director: Rakeysh Omprakash Mehra Awards: Apsara Award-Best ActorFarhan Akhtar , Best film, Best director, Best Film, Best story. Filmfare Awards- Best Actor Farhan Aktar, Best Film, Best Lyricist.

programme.title: Mirzya
programme.desc: Monish and Suchitra, who are childhood sweethearts, get separated while growing up. Their romance is reignited when they meet as adults. Release Year: 2016 Director: Rakeysh Omprakash Mehra

programme.title: Kurukshetra
programme.desc: Due to his excellent performance in the Indian Armed Forces, Major Barkat Singh is thrust the responsibility to capture a notorious criminal. Post assignment, he faces numerous challenges. Release Year: 2000 Director: Major Ravi

programme.title: Dhol
programme.desc: Four friends set out in their individual plans to marry wealthy Ritu Tanushree. Their plan however goes horribly wrong after they get embroiled with a notorious criminal. Release Year: 2007 Director: Priyadarshan

programme.title: Dulaara
programme.desc: When Raja and Priya fall in love, Priya's brother frames Raja for murder. The only way Raja can clear his name, is to find the real killer. Release Year: 1994 Director: Vimal Kumar

programme.title: Golmaal Again
programme.desc: The gang of five encounters some spiritual bodies and finds out the truth about the Jamnadas Orphanage where they were brought up.

programme.title: Wah ! Tera Kya Kehna
programme.desc: Dilip and Ashish plan to prove that their brother Raj is mentally incompetent to inherit their father Kishan Oberoi's property. However, Raj's lookalike takes his place and reaps the benefits.

programme.title: Pyaar Ke Side Effects
programme.desc: A romantic comedy where two strangers meet and disappear, only to unite months later in the most unexpected way. Release Year: 2006 Director: Saket Chaudhary Awards: World Fest-Houston International Film Festival- Remi Award for Creative Excellence

programme.title: Manje Bistre
programme.desc: While prepping for a family wedding, a young man falls for his sister's friend, who has already been promised to someone else.

programme.title: Hate Story 3
programme.desc: A business tycoon, and his wife Zareen Khan meet a stranger named Saurav Karan Grover. He happens to be an enemy from his past plotting to seek revenge. Release Year: 2015 Director: Vishal Pandya

programme.title: Made In China
programme.desc: Story of Failed Gujarati Businessman, who jumps into unknown world of China to get once in a life time business idea, which will change his life.

programme.title: The President Is Coming
programme.desc: Six young contestants undergo bizarre tests and stop at nothing to top the list of the young faces responsible for shaping 'The New India' and eventually meet George Bush.

programme.title: Dil Dosti Etc
programme.desc: Two college boys arrogance leads them to challenge each other to prove their efficiencies. It stars Shreyas Talpade, Imaad Shah, Nikita Anand, Smriti Mishra and Ishita Sharma. Release Year: 2007

programme.title: Ekk Deewana Tha
programme.desc: Sachin Prateik Babbar falls in love with Jessie Amy Jackson, a girl from an orthodox Christian family. Religious disparities however continue to strain their relationship. Release Year: 2012 Director: Gautham Menon

programme.title: Do Matwale
programme.desc: Amar takes to crime in order to facilitate his mother's surgery. He also falls in love with Dr Pooja only to realise that her brother is an old friend who is harbouring ill intentions towards him.

programme.title: Bhoot Unkle
programme.desc: The life of a little boy changes when he befriends a pirate's ghost with magical powers. Release Year: 2006 Director: Mukesh Saigal

programme.title: Mangal Pandey: The Rising
programme.desc: Mangal Pandey, a sepoy of Indian origin, fights against British rule and saves the life of his British commanding officer, leading to a strong friendship between the two. Release Year: 2005 Director: Ketan Mehta

programme.title: Running Shaadi
programme.desc: The story of a bunch of small town entrepreneurs who start a website to help couples elope and marry. Release Year: 2017 Director: Amit Roy

programme.title: Sardaar Ji
programme.desc: A smart, young, fearless, Indian ghost hunter who traps ghosts in bottles, falls in love with a female ghost.

programme.title: India's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Five ordinary men, one global terrorist, witness India's biggest manhunt operation in this film inspired by true events.

programme.title: Maatr
programme.desc: 2017 Thriller film revolves around Vidya Raveena Tandon, who's left shattered after her daughter Tia's Alisha Khan murder, seeks vengeance by fighting the broken justice and criminal system.

programme.title: Tezz
programme.desc: Rana is deported because of his illegal status. He returns with a vengeance and with the help of his former employees, wreaks havoc. Release Year: 2012 Director: Priyadarshan

programme.title: Do Qaidi
programme.desc: Manu and Kanu are petty thieves who escape from jail and find themselves suspected of murdering a police inspector. Release Year: 1989 Director: Ajay Kashyap

programme.title: Dil Jo Bhi Kahey (2005)
programme.desc: Jai falls in love with fellow student Sophie, but her rich, white parents do not want their daughter dating an Indian. The two face several challenges as they prove their love for each other.

programme.title: Do Dooni Panj
programme.desc: A college graduate sues his school and his teachers when he cannot get a job.

programme.title: Panga
programme.desc: An emotional roller coaster tale of a forgotten Kabaddi world champion who catalyzes an inner desire to give a new meaning to her existing role as a wife and mother, and makes a comeback.

programme.title: Jhootha Hi Sahi
programme.desc: Sidharth ends up as a counsellor when his phone number gets listed in the Indian suicide helpline. Release Year: 2010 Director: Abbas Tyrewala

programme.title: Ramprasad Ki Tehrvi
programme.desc: Conflicts, complications and confrontations make for an emotional and eventful affair when a multigenerational family reunites in Lucknow.

programme.title: Sardaar Ji 2
programme.desc: 2016 Comedy Jaggi Diljit Dosanjh, a farmer, travels to Australia so that he is able to earn money to save his village. Does he manage to save his village? The film also stars Sonam Bajwa.

programme.title: Bioscopewala
programme.desc: 2018 Drama film is the story of Rehmat Khan, a man from Kabul, who used to show films to children through his Bioscope. It stars Danny Denzongpa, Geetanjali Thapa, Adil Hussain and Tisca Chopra.

programme.title: Maqbool
programme.desc: An underworld don's henchman, falls in love with his boss's mistress, Nimmi Tabu, who instigates him to kill the don and become the next leader. Release Year: 2003 Director: Vishal Bhardwaj

programme.title: Mandi - The Market Place
programme.desc: Rukminibai runs a brothel that was once patronised by princes and the prestige of which has largely diminished. Consequently, she now finds herself dependent on the whims of the moral and the corrupt.

programme.title: Dillagi
programme.desc: Unaware that his brother is in love with the girl he himself loves, Ranvir arranges for their wedding. Release Year: 1999

programme.title: Deewanapan (2001)
programme.desc: A country boy falls in love with the daughter of a rich man, and moves to the city to be with her. But the girl's father is determined to go to any length to break up the mismatched romance.

programme.title: Dhruva (2016)
programme.desc: Dhruva, an IPS officer, discovers a strong network of organized crime. He then intends to take down the mastermind behind a huge racket and encounters numerous challenges on his way.

programme.title: Aisha
programme.desc: Aisha is a jet setter who tries her hand at match making. It takes a couple of disasters before she comes to her senses. Release Year: 2010 Director: Rajshree Ojha

programme.title: The Ghazi Attack
programme.desc: Based on true event of the mysterious sinking of a Pakistani submarine, PNS Ghazi, during Indo-Pak War of 1971. It stars Rana Daggubati, Kay Kay Menon and Atul Kulkarni.

programme.title: Mar Gaye Oye Loko
programme.desc: Mar Gaye Oye Loko

programme.title: Nishabd
programme.desc: A man in his sixties falls in love with a teenage girl. This affects his relationship with his wife and daughter, whose friend is the girl he loves. Release Year: 2007 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: Makkhi
programme.desc: Nani loves Bindu but is killed by a jealous Sudeep, who lusts after Bindu. Nani is reincarnated as a fly and decides to avenge his death. The film stars Sudeep, Nani and Samantha. Release Year: 2012 Director: S.S. Rajamouli

programme.title: Tennis Buddies
programme.desc: A young tennis player gets trained by her father who used to play the game too. Problems arise when they do not agree with each other's ideologies of playing single as against playing as a team.

programme.title: Dear Dad
programme.desc: A teenager Himanshu Sharma and his father Arvind Swamy form a special bond with each other while on an unplanned road trip from Delhi to Mussoorie. Release Year: 2016 Director: Tanuj Bhramar

programme.title: Dil Hai Ke Manta Nahin
programme.desc: A rich, spoilt girl runs away to marry her lover. En route, she meets with a stranger and starts to fall in love with him. Release Year: 1991 Director: Mahesh Bhatt Awards: Filmfare Award- Best Playback Singer- Anuradha Paudwal for the song dil hai ke mante nahi

programme.title: Deewana Main Deewana
programme.desc: Basant always gets what he wants and when he falls in love with Priya at first sight, he wants her to be his. Later, he impersonates his friend Vasant, who had saved her life before, to win her over.

programme.title: Hero (2015)
programme.desc: Sooraj, the son of gangster Suryakant Pasha, kidnaps Radha, the daughter of the chief of police. They fall in love after spending some time together but the police and Pasha's men keep chasing them.

programme.title: Bala
programme.desc: Bala, a young man, suffers from premature balding and struggles to measure up to social beauty standards. When his insecurity threatens his marriage, he seeks the help of a dark-complexioned lawyer.

programme.title: Angrezi Medium
programme.desc: Though Champak initially disapproves, he eventually does everything in his power while going through a series of hilarious mishaps to fulfil his daughter's dream of going to London to study further.

programme.title: Yamla Pagla Deewana Phir Se
programme.desc: Inheriting from the ancestors, the legacy of the Ayurveda panacea 'Vajrakavach', a famed and effective remedy for all ills, the brother duo Pooran and Kaala use the kavach with varied intentions

programme.title: Dishoom
programme.desc: Two cops, Kabir John Abraham and Junaid Varun Dhawan, go on a mission to rescue Viraj Saqib Saleem, a top cricketer, who has been kidnapped by Wagah Akshaye Khanna, a bookie. Release Year: 2016

programme.title: Programmabeschrijving niet beschikbaar
programme.desc: Programmabeschrijving niet beschikbaar

programme.title: Programmabeschrijving niet beschikbaar
programme.desc: Programmabeschrijving niet beschikbaar

programme.title: Programmabeschrijving niet beschikbaar
programme.desc: Programmabeschrijving niet beschikbaar

programme.title: Programmabeschrijving niet beschikbaar
programme.desc: Programmabeschrijving niet beschikbaar
